findings.title: Hardcoded database connection string and SMTP credentials
findings.description: Full PostgreSQL connection URI with embedded password and SMTP credentials stored as const string literals

findings.title: Database connection string leaked in error response
findings.description: Report generation handler returns database connection string with embedded credentials in error response

findings.title: Debug endpoint exposes full user records including passwords
findings.description: Debug endpoint serializes complete User struct including password field to any authenticated user

findings.title: Password reset token and SMTP server returned in API response
findings.description: Password reset token and internal SMTP hostname returned directly in API response

findings.title: Config endpoint exposes all infrastructure credentials
findings.description: Admin config endpoint returns database connection string with password and SMTP credentials
